response:
Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
The model must be packaged and uploaded to an S3 bucket for access. * * *  
Data preprocessing and model optimization are critical to ensure efficient deployment. * * *  
The model is trained and validated using a cloud-based environment like EC2. * * *  
Model overfitting can occur if the training data is not representative. * * *  
Regular validation and pruning are necessary to maintain performance. * * *  
Data security is a concern when deploying on AWS; encryption and access controls must be implemented. * * *  
AWS provides tools like IAM and VPC to secure data and model access. * * *  
Potential obstacles include network latency and insufficient computational resources. * * *  
Remedies involve optimizing the model and using AWS services like SageMaker for efficient deployment. * * *
